title: Salty-Light-Romantic Italian Masarepa Stir-fry
description: This dish combines the lightness of masarepa with a savory touch, ideal for a romantic dinner or as an appetizer.

ingredients.name: Fresh vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, onions, cherry tomatoes),

instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat. Add olive oil and wait until hot.
Place masarepa slices in the skillet. Sauté for about 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Add minced garlic to the skillet, stir-fry for another minute.
Gently add chopped fresh vegetables into the skillet, mixing well with the garlic and oil mixture. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Stir in low-sodium soy sauce (or tamari), reduce heat to medium-low, then cover and cook for about 2 minutes more until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Sprinkle fresh herbs over the dish before serving.
